articles.title: Trump slaps 50% tariffs on Canada and Carney vows to 'intensify' trade talks - BBC
articles.description: The duties mark a major escalation in trade tensions between the North American neighbours.
articles.content: Everyday consumer items like wine and hockey sticks and industrial goods such as cement are among the goods targeted. However, several key exports will be spared, such as energy, potash, critical min… [+14 chars]

articles.title: Man stabs tourists near the Acropolis in Athens, Greece - AP News
articles.description: A man has stabbed and wounded two tourists near the ancient Acropolis in Athens, Greece’s top tourist attraction. The assailant attacked a man and a woman, both Greek Americans, with a knife Tuesday morning near the entrance to the Acropolis Museum, which lie…
articles.content:
ATHENS, Greece (AP) A man stabbed and wounded two tourists Tuesday morning near the ancient Acropolis in Athens, Greeces top tourist attraction, police said.
